CustomField.description: The percentage amount to be charged as the service fee, which will be calculated on top of the billed/collected amount. This fee represents the service charge for facilitating the transaction. For example, if you enter '3', a 3% service fee will be applied to the total billed/collected amount.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the percentage amount to be charged as the service fee, which will be calculated on top of the billed/collected amount. This fee represents the service charge for facilitating the transaction. For example, if you enter '3', a 3% service fee will be applied to the total billed/collected amount.
CustomField.label: Service Fee%
